name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state



Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = "idle"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = "trying"
    /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = "critical"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

(* Participants are numbered 1..N *)
Participants == 1..N

(* Coordinator is a single process *)
Coordinator == 1

(* Message types *)
Prepare == "Prepare"
VoteYes == "VoteYes"
VoteNo == "VoteNo"
Commit == "Commit"
Abort == "Abort"

(* Message structure: [sender \in Participants \/ Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \/ Coordinator, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}] *)
Message == [sender \in Participants \/ Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \/ Coordinator, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}]

(* All messages are stored in the messages set *)
AllMessages == [msg \in messages |-> [sender \in Participants \/ Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \/ Coordinator, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}]]

(* Initial state: all participants are in the "Init" state, coordinator is in "Start" state, no messages *)
Init == /\ participants \in [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
        /\ coordinator \in {"Start"}
        /\ messages \in {}

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
CoordinatorSendPrepare == /\ coordinator = "Start"
                         /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Prepare] : p \in Participants }
                         /\ coordinator' = "WaitingForVotes"

(* Participants receive Prepare and vote yes *)
ParticipantVoteYes == /\ \E p \in Participants : participants[p] = "Init"
                     /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.type = Prepare /\ msg.receiver \in Participants
                     /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![msg.receiver] = "VotedYes"]
                     /\ messages' = messages \ {msg}
                     /\ coordinator' = "WaitingForVotes"

(* Participants vote no *)
ParticipantVoteNo == /\ \E p \in Participants : participants[p] = "Init"
                    /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.type = Prepare /\ msg.receiver \in Participants
                    /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![msg.receiver] = "VotedNo"]
                    /\ messages' = messages \ {msg}
                    /\ coordinator' = "WaitingForVotes"

(* Coordinator decides to commit if all participants voted yes *)
CoordinatorCommit == /\ coordinator = "WaitingForVotes"
                    /\ \A p \in Participants : participants[p] = "VotedYes"
                    /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Commit] : p \in Participants }
                    /\ coordinator' = "Committed"

(* Coordinator decides to abort if any participant voted no *)
CoordinatorAbort == /\ coordinator = "WaitingForVotes"
                   /\ \E p \in Participants : participants[p] = "VotedNo"
                   /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Abort] : p \in Participants }
                   /\ coordinator' = "Aborted"

(* Participants receive Commit and transition to "Committed" *)
ParticipantCommit == /\ \E p \in Participants : participants[p] = "VotedYes"
                    /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.type = Commit /\ msg.receiver \in Participants
                    /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![msg.receiver] = "Committed"]
                    /\ messages' = messages \ {msg}
                    /\ coordinator' = coordinator

(* Participants receive Abort and transition to "Aborted" *)
ParticipantAbort == /\ \E p \in Participants : participants[p] = "VotedNo"
                   /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.type = Abort /\ msg.receiver \in Participants
                   /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![msg.receiver] = "Aborted"]
                   /\ messages' = messages \ {msg}
                   /\ coordinator' = coordinator

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == CoordinatorSendPrepare \/ ParticipantVoteYes \/ ParticipantVoteNo \/ CoordinatorCommit \/ CoordinatorAbort \/ ParticipantCommit \/ ParticipantAbort

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ participants \in [p \in Participants |-> {"Init", "VotedYes", "VotedNo", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
          /\ coordinator \in {"Start", "WaitingForVotes", "Committed", "Aborted"}
          /\ messages \in {msg \in Message}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j if philosopher j holds fork i *)
(* State: state[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N : (state[i] = "thinking" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"])
      \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = i
          /\ forks[If(i = 1, N, i - 1)] = i
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![If(i = 1, N, i - 1)] = i]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
      \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![If(i = 1, N, i - 1)] = i]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({IF flag[j] THEN num[j] ELSE 0 : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
    /\ head \in 1..K
    /\ tail \in 1..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue an element *)
Enqueue(e) == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, e)
    /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ head' = head

(* Consumer action: dequeue an element *)
Dequeue == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ q' = Tail(q)
    /\ tail' = tail

(* Next-state relation: either enqueue or dequeue *)
Next == 
    \/ \E e \in 1..K : Enqueue(e)
    \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = {}
  /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat :
       /\ state = "Follower"
       /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
       /\ votedFor' = {}
       /\ state' = "Follower"
  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat : \E candidate \in Nat :
       /\ state = "Follower"
       /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
       /\ votedFor' = {candidate}
       /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat : \E candidate \in Nat :
       /\ state = "Candidate"
       /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
       /\ votedFor' = {candidate}
       /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
